codeLensPatterns.title: Selector: ${1} — Show specificity & matched elements
codeLensPatterns.description: Displays specificity calculation, inheritance chain, and approximate element match count for this CSS selector rule.

codeLensPatterns.title: Media: ${1} — Show breakpoint details
codeLensPatterns.description: Shows the media query condition, applicable viewport ranges, and the number of rules contained within this @media block.

codeLensPatterns.title: Animation: ${1} — Find usages
codeLensPatterns.description: Shows all elements referencing this @keyframes animation by animation-name property across the stylesheet.

codeLensPatterns.title: Variable: --${1} — Find references
codeLensPatterns.description: Counts and lists all var(--${1}) references across stylesheets to show where this custom property is consumed.

codeLensPatterns.title: Font: ${1} — Find usages
codeLensPatterns.description: Lists all elements using this @font-face defined font-family across stylesheets.

codeLensPatterns.title: Layer: ${1} — Show cascade order
codeLensPatterns.description: Displays cascade layer ordering and the number of rules assigned to this layer across all stylesheets.

codeLensPatterns.title: Import: ${1} — Open file
codeLensPatterns.description: Opens the imported CSS file for viewing or editing.

codeLensPatterns.title: Feature Query: ${1} — Show browser support
codeLensPatterns.description: Displays browser compatibility information for the queried CSS feature.

codeLensPatterns.title: Container Query — Show container details
codeLensPatterns.description: Shows the container query condition and identifies the matching container element by name or proximity.
